---
title: "Simulation via mzML: SimID xx:xx"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_notebook:
    df_print: paged
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: yes
---


```{r setup, include=TRUE}
library(assertthat)
library(plyr)
library(reshape2)
library(knitr)
library(MakeSearchSim)
library(ggplot2)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,cache = TRUE, autodep = TRUE)
```

# Reproducibility Information

Using below version of MakeSearchSim
```{r}
packageVersion("MakeSearchSim")
```

Using below version of R. Version 3.6.0 introduced a significant change to how random numbers are generated. (see ?selectScans for details). Keep track of what version of R was used when generating simulations. 

```{r}
getRversion()
```

Current random number generator (RNG) state. 

```{r}
RNGkind()
```

Session info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```



## Dataset Background
SimID xx-xx has xx as the primary and x contributor organisms. Selecting x proteins and y peptides per protein. 

# Loading MSGF+ Results and SimRecipes

```{r Loading-Inputs}
#loading MSGF+ results



#loading SimRecipes


```

Generating Simulated filenames

```{r Make-Sim-Names}
SimRecipes$SimFileName <- paste0(substr(SimRecipes$PrimaryOrganism,1,6),
                                '_',substr(SimRecipes$ContributorOrganism,1,6),
                        '_Nprot',SimRecipes$TargetNumContributorProteins,
                        '_Npep', SimRecipes$TargetContributorPep_per_Prot,
                                '_SimID',SimRecipes$SimID, ".mzML")
```

# Running MakeSimFile
**Add dbResults parameter**
**check rng_version parameter**

Verify you want to use the default RNG state for the currently installed version of R. See ?selectScans for more details. 
```{r Make-Sim-Files}
dataTracker <- ddply(SimRecipes, .(SimID), MakeSimFile, dbResults = , rng_version = "R_version_default" )
```

# Running Novor
What settings? Defaults to NovorParams_fTol002_pTol15_MetOx_noAlk_Novor_params.txt

```{r Run-Novor}
msConvert_config <- system.file("extdata", "convertMGF_config.txt", package = "MakeSearchSim", mustWork = TRUE)

#For alkylated samples (fixed carbamidomethylation modification)
novor_config <- system.file("extdata", "NovorParams_fTol002_pTol15_MetOx_noAlk_Novor_params.txt", package = "MakeSearchSim", mustWork = TRUE)

#For non-alkylated samples (variable methionine oxidation modification only)
# novor_config <- system.file("extdata", "NovorParams_fTol002_pTol15_MetOx_Alk_Novor_params.txt", 
#                             package="MakeSearchSim", mustWork = TRUE)


#choose path to Novor .bat file
path_to_novor <- choose.files()

#running runNovorSingle() on each row of dataTracker
#change mgf_output_dir if you desire somthing other than the working directory.
dataTracker <- ddply(dataTracker,.(SimID), runNovorSingle,  msConvert_config = msConvert_config, novor_config = novor_config, Novor_Path = path_to_novor, mgf_output_dir = ".")
```

## Import and filter results
Filtering to +/- 15 ppm precursor error with a minimum score of 70 and a minimum peptide length of 6. 

```{r Import-Filter}
SimResultList <- dlply(dataTracker,.(SimID), importFilter_Novor, 
                       ppmErrorMin = -15, 
                       ppmErrorMax = 15,
                       minNovorScore = 70, 
                       minLength = 6)
```


# Digesting peptides and writing output files

```{r Write-Peptide-Files}
#use outputFileDir to set output folder
digest_pep_table <- ldply(SimResultList, makePepFile, prolineBlock = TRUE, discardLessThan = 6, datasetCol = "MGFDataset")

#merging back into dataTracker to add number of digested peptides
dataTracker <- merge(dataTracker, digest_pep_table, by = "SimID", all = TRUE)
```

Saving dataTracker
**Update Variable Name**
```{r Save-Data-Tracker}
dataTracker_Simxx_xx <- dataTracker
save(dataTracker_Simxx_xx, file = "dataTracker_Simxx_xx.RData")
```
